ValidationRule.description: All Opportunities with the Status 'Closed Lost' and the Reason Won/Lost 'Other' need to have a Reason Won/Lost Comment
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
ZImportSource__c != "Print Plus - Talend Job #1020", ISPICKVAL( StageName , "Closed Lost"), INCLUDES( ReasonWonLost__c, "Other"), ISBLANK( ReasonWonLostComment__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Every Opportunity with the Status 'Closed Lost' and the Reason Won/Lost 'Other' need to have a Reason Won/Lost Comment. (OP002)
